description: Phase 1F: Fix build failures. After typecheck passes, ensure 'pnpm build' passes for all packages that have a build script. Currently build fails on @quant/social-graph and @quant/search (which cascade to downstream packages). These build scripts use 'tsc' (not --noEmit) so they produce dist/ output. The same TS errors from typecheck apply plus test files get compiled.
steps: After FEAT-002 through FEAT-006 are complete, run 'pnpm build' to see remaining failures.

For packages that build with 'tsc' but include test files in compilation: either exclude test files from the build tsconfig (add 'exclude': ['src/**/*.test.ts', 'src/__tests__/**'] to their tsconfig.json), or fix any remaining test file errors.
For @quant/database: verify its build script (prisma generate) still works. It should not need tsc since it just generates the Prisma client.

For the 8 packages with no scripts at all (admin, analytics, data-pipeline, developer-platform, ecosystem-bridge, gaming, i18n, performance): leave them as-is. They have no build/typecheck scripts so turbo skips them. They likely contain just source files without proper tsconfig.
Run 'pnpm build' and verify all packages with build scripts succeed.
Run 'pnpm typecheck' one final time to confirm full monorepo typecheck passes.
acceptance_criteria: No test files are included in production build output (dist/)
verification: Run 'pnpm build' and confirm exit code 0 with all tasks successful
Run 'pnpm typecheck' and confirm exit code 0 with all tasks successful
Run 'pnpm install --frozen-lockfile' to confirm no lockfile changes
